featured art

Accessibility

This website (meowpricot.art) was created, to the best of the creator’s ability, to be accessible following the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines.


I have used the WAVE Browser Extension to check this website for accessibility errors. I have also gone through the Easy Checks method for further checking.


Implemented accessibility features

This site has the following checks and features implemented:

  • Layout still functions up to 200%
  • Mobile-responsive layout
  • Alt text for images when descriptions are needed, otherwise hidden
  • Body font colour meets AA contrast levels
  • Semantic HTML5 with clear headings

Features that are currently missing

This site is missing these features, but are planned to be added in the future:

  • Dark mode layout
  • Skip to main content & jump to top of the page

If you have any issues navigating this site, have any concerns or feedback, or if something needs to be fixed, please email me. I want as many people to enjoy my site as possible, just as much as I have enjoyed creating it!

© 2025-2026 meowpricot
